description_long: This is a life-sized stone sculpture of a seated human figure, depicted in a contemplative pose with one hand resting on the armrest and the other on the lap. The figure is draped in a long robe, with detailed folds and realistic anatomical features, and sits on a high-backed chair. The sculpture is mounted on a multi-tiered rectangular stone pedestal, which itself is set on a square paved platform. The base of the pedestal features an inscription, though the text is not fully legible in the images. The entire structure is made of a light-colored stone, likely marble, and shows signs of weathering consistent with outdoor installation. The surrounding platform is composed of large, square stone tiles with some visible moss or grass in the joints.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a seated, robed human figure on a high-backed chair, mounted on a multi-tiered pedestal and square stone platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, both hands, and the inscription on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the seated figure and the depth of the chair and pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the chair and the layered structure of the pedestal and platform.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile and the draping of the robe over the chair.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a paved stone platform, likely in a public square or park.
